description: Real-world school digest with Valentine's Day party photos (past) and newsletter with future author visit

input_summary.subject: Feb 12, 2026 Digest: 2 new messages from Walnut Heights School today

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.location: Walnut Heights School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Author visit at school with book signing. Books can be pre-ordered through Rakestraw Bookstore.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase
events.description: TK and K music showcase. Livestream available.

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.description: Double author visit to Kindergarten-Koeltl class. Students can pre-order books through Rakestraw Bookstore to have them signed by the authors on the day of the visit. Books will be delivered on the day of the event. Shipping address for orders is the school's address.

events.title: No School - Presidents Day
events.description: School closed for Presidents Day. No school February 12th-16th.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase
events.description: Spring Music Showcase for TK and Kindergarten students. Event will showcase what TK and K students have been working on in Music class with Mrs. Gold. A livestream will be available for those who cannot attend in person. Livestream link will be sent out a few days before the event. Contact Mrs. Gold at jcousins@walnutcreeksd.org for questions.
